headline: 1MDB asset recovery reached only 38% after 9 years
context: As of March 2026, Malaysia has recovered only RM16.3 billion of the estimated RM42.8 billion in 1MDB-related losses, nine years after investigations began.

cards.big: Only 38% of 1MDB money recovered after 9 years — RM26.5 billion still missing
cards.sub: At current pace, full recovery would take until 2041 if it happens at all

cards.big: DOJ settlements with Goldman Sachs and others totalled USD4.5 billion globally
cards.sub: Malaysia's share of international settlements was only USD3.9 billion or 60%

cards.big: Annual debt servicing on 1MDB obligations still costs RM2.8 billion per year
cards.sub: Every Malaysian household effectively pays RM340 annually for this financial scandal

cards.big: Special 1MDB task force was quietly downsized from 45 to 12 officers in 2025
cards.sub: Reduced capacity signals political will for recovery may be fading

cards.big: 1MDB isn't history — Malaysians are still paying for it every single budget cycle
Should the 1MDB recovery effort have a dedicated statutory body with public reporting?
